name: Bodhi Tree Biotechnology Inc
business: Bodhi Tree Biotechnology Inc. is an early-stage consulting company providing plant-based menu design, recipe development, and vegetarian diet consulting services to consumers seeking flexitarian, vegetarian, and organic lifestyles.
sellsTo: individuals interested in vegetarian and plant-based diets

exposures.sentence: We are an early-stage consulting company focused on providing plant-based menu design, recipe development, and vegetarian diet consulting services.
